description.value: The creature is so terrifying and unnatural that it is almost impossible to destroy. It is immune to Stunning, and ignores all Critical Effects except those that would destroy it outright (such as decapitation or total immolation at the GM's discretion). Wounds that reduce it below 0 have no additional effect.

system.benefit: Immune to Stunning. Ignores all Critical Effects except instant-kill results (GM discretion). Damage below 0 Wounds has no additional effect.
